Giggle Water Creek isn’t just haunted. It’s hungry.

trending.title: Ink and Blood
trending.author: S.J Calloway.
trending.description:
Mika is a data scientist. Quiet. Observant. A ghost in her own life.
Until she sees something she was never meant to—
a murder on a crowded subway.
No one else saw it. But she did.
And worse—he saw her watching.

Seamus is a contract killer. Controlled. Ruthless. The best at what he does.
He’s not supposed to have weaknesses.
But there was something in her gaze—something curious, fearless, alive—that he can’t shake.

He lets her go.
Then he starts watching her.

And when her name comes up as his next target, he makes a choice that will change everything.

What begins as a hunt becomes a fixation.
What should’ve ended in blood becomes an obsession.

Now she’s trapped in his world.
And the more he tries to keep his distance,
the more he wants to destroy anything that touches her.

This is not a romance.
It’s a possession.
And neither of them will come out clean.

trending.title: EVEN AFTER YOU
trending.author: Chocolatefinger16
trending.description:
Alessia Moretti was born into a legacy of wealth, silence, and shadows. When her powerful father dies unexpectedly, she returns to Florence — not in grief, but in search of what never made sense. The funeral is lavish, the condolences practiced. But what catches her eye isn’t in the eulogy. It’s a name in the guestbook. A stranger who stood apart. Watching.

A sealed envelope from her father's lawyer deepens the mystery — an addendum to his will, locked behind a single condition: it must not be opened unless something happens to Giuliana De Luca — the woman who raised Alessia, but never quite loved her. The woman who replaced her mother. The woman with secrets buried deeper than the grave.

As Alessia begins to peel back the layers of the house — and her own memory — she uncovers missing tapes, manipulated truths, and a man named Matteo who seems tied to it all. A man she should stay away from. A man who might already know who she really is.

But nothing in the Moretti legacy is what it seems.

Not her past.
Not her family.
Not even herself.

And some ghosts don’t stay buried.

Even After You is a dark, slow-burn romantic thriller about power, obsession, and the brutal things we inherit. For readers who crave revenge laced with longing, and love that demands blood before it offers softness.

trending.title: A Summer's Tragedy
trending.author: Author Warren II
trending.description:
One summer, Callisto and his family visited the town of Isabela, the place where the legendary Mt. Octover could be found. In a short time, Callisto met and fell in love with a strange girl named Stalin. However, their relationship wasn’t easy because Stalin had been cursed by a goddess named Estrella, and she had lost her sanity.
During their vacation, Sebastian and Dorothy, Callisto’s parents, reminisced their memories from seventeen years earlier, when they were a young couple. But not all those memories were pleasant; some were nightmares they wished to forget forever. Due to amnesia, however, Callisto’s father couldn't remember any of it.
Callisto had a sister named Ruth, but she wasn’t his sister by blood. Ruth was adopted from an orphanage. Unbeknownst to the family, she was actually one of Estrella’s minions.
Now it's your turn to accompany Callisto in his journey to unravel the mysteries of his parents’ past, the curse haunting his beloved Stalin, and the true intention behind Ruth’s return.

trending.title: Serelina Vale: The Awakening
trending.author: Lindsey Marie
trending.description: What if Serelina was never meant to survive that night? Serelina wakes up in a hospital with no memory of how she got there. No ID. No injuries. No answers. Just a shadowy impression of a man in a dark suit. And a laugh that wont leave her mind. As strange visions flicker at the edge of her dreams, and her instincts sharpen into something almost inhuman. Changing in side of her. She begins to realize that what happening to her might be far more dangerous than amnesia. Someone tried to do something to her. Someone else didn't let it happen. But who are they? Why was all this happening? But most importantly. What exactly was happening to her?

trending.title: Woodlock: No Escape
trending.author: queensofsupreme
trending.description:
A student at Woodlock in 1899, desperate to escape the academy's tyranny, performs a forbidden ritual in the bell tower — and vanishes.
In 2025, Deena discovers a hidden staircase sealed behind the library wall.
When she climbs it during a storm, she hears voices — her own... and the girl's from 1899.

trending.title: Sold to be Loved by the Mafia Prince
trending.author: Nela JW
trending.description:
Sold to Be Loved by the Mafia Prince is a dark, emotionally charged New Adult romance set in a world where power is inherited, trust is a weapon, and love is the most dangerous game of all.

When seventeen-year-old Malia sacrifices her freedom to save her father, she is thrust into the violent world of the Italian Mafia—betrothed to Blaine DeCavalcante, the cold and untouchable Capo Bastone. Held at the luxurious yet haunting Crimson Garden estate, Malia must navigate a new life of control, secrets, and manipulation, all under the watchful eye of her fake fiancé’s double, Marcello.

But Marcello is more than just a stand-in. He’s her shadow, her tormentor, her unexpected comfort—and the one man she can’t figure out. As she battles fear, growing attraction, and the terrifying reality of her arranged future, Malia begins to uncover truths buried beneath Mafia loyalty, violent legacies, and the twisted lines between love and possession.

Told in alternating points of view, Sold to Be Loved by the Mafia Prince blends psychological tension, emotional vulnerability, and slow-burning obsession. It's a story about identity, power, and the impossible choice between surrendering to your fate—or rewriting it from the inside.

This is not a love story.
This is a war.
And the battlefield is her heart.

trending.title: The mafioso's obsession
trending.author: Joice Karen
trending.description:
I have recurring dreams about a mysterious man who watches over me as I sleep. But I know he can’t be real—at least, that’s what I thought until today.

I’ve spent my life running with my mother. She always said we couldn’t stay in one place for more than six months. Whenever I asked why, she never gave me an answer.

On my 18th birthday, I decided to apply to university. I thought it was a good way to start adulthood. I should’ve listened to my mother.

The consequence of disobeying her came that same day. The reason we’ve been running all these years was to escape my sadistic, mafia father. His first words to me were: “You showed up at the perfect age to get married. Go get ready to meet your fiancé.”

I had to behave—for the sake of my mother’s safety.

My fiancé was old enough to be my grandfather and looked at me like I was his favorite dessert. But he wasn’t the one who caught my attention. His son did.

Standing beside the man I was promised to… was the man from my dreams, in the flesh—dangerous, tempting, and very real.

All I want now is to find a way to escape, but now that I know he exists, I realize I won’t get very far.

trending.title: THE ASH PROTOCOL
trending.author: Popoola Omogbolahan
trending.description:
Every victim had the same thing in common.
None of them had ever met Detective Celia Hart.
Until the night one of them whispered her name before dying.
***
When ritualistic murders surface across the city—each marked by bloodied roses and a single spiral—Detective Celia Hart is pulled into a case that feels disturbingly personal.

Because the killer isn’t choosing victims at random.
He’s following a pattern… one that leads straight to her.

The deeper Celia and her partner Mara Vex dig, the uglier the truth becomes: a corrupt police brotherhood, a cult that turns children into vessels, and the Ash Protocol itself—a living contagion that doesn’t just break minds… it rewrites reality.

And it has already marked Celia.

The spiral on her wrist isn’t a scar.
It’s a key.

As memories she never lived begin to surface, Celia realizes the impossible:
their world is a collapsing simulation, trapped in an endless time loop—and she is the anomaly at its center.

The one created to stop it.
Or to destroy everything.

But breaking the cycle comes at a cost.

Because in every timeline where the world survives—
Mara doesn’t.

Now, with reality fracturing and the Protocol spreading, Celia has one final choice:
save the world… or save the woman she refuses to lose.

The spiral is tightening.
The system is watching.
And this time—there may be no reset.

trending.title: Who's Watching Who
trending.author: Kerry Kennedy Author kennedy
trending.description:
Claire thought escaping him would be the end.
She was wrong. It was only the beginning.

After years of surviving Jonathan’s cruelty, Claire finally finds the courage to disappear. New city. New name. New life. But the past isn’t finished with her yet.

Someone is watching. Her every move. Her every moment. Silent. Unseen. Waiting.

As Claire begins to piece herself back together, disturbing signs appear—familiar shadows, untraceable calls, and the gnawing sense that someone is always a step behind. But it’s not just Jonathan she needs to fear. There are others hiding in plain sight. People she once trusted.

And someone is about to make her pay—for love, for betrayal, and for choices she never knew she made.

Who's Watching Who is a gripping psychological thriller filled with chilling twists, buried secrets, and a race to find the truth before it finds her.

trending.title: The Other Me
trending.author: Agatha
trending.description:
The peaceful and tranquil town of Bermington has recently experienced a horrific murder case. Charles Jones, a full-time writer, allegedly broke into the home of Lawrence, an engineer, and brutally killed the family of three. 
Police immediately arrested him, but after several interrogations, officers learned a shocking secret: the real killer wasn't him, but rather some kind of entity that shared his exact appearance, build, and even his name and DNA...

trending.title: SECOND SKIN
trending.author: Popoola Omogbolahan
trending.description: Detective Lana Seo wakes up in a stranger’s body with no memory of how she arrived there. Each day, she inhabits a different person’s life — some allies, some adversaries — all connected by a sinister conspiracy lurking beneath the city’s surface. Haunted by fractured memories of her true self and pursued by unseen enemies, Lana must navigate shifting identities and hidden truths to uncover the dangerous secret before she loses her own soul to the shadows. With every step, the line between friend and foe blurs, and the price of the truth may be her very existence.

trending.title: The endless exhibit
trending.author: zamoraotuonye3
trending.description:
Title: The Endless Exhibit
By: Zamora Moe
Description:
After her husband’s death at the opening gala of their prestigious museum, Vivienne Langford is left with more than grief—she’s left with silence. The files don’t match. Names vanish. Her past rewrites itself with every room she walks into.
And then there’s the girl.
Emeline.
A name no one else remembers—but one Vivienne keeps finding tucked into dusty archives, forgotten sketches, and unfinished exhibits. As the museum’s reopening stirs long-buried secrets, Vivienne begins to suspect that her memory isn’t broken—it’s been altered.
Detective Marlowe was only supposed to investigate the murder. But the widow’s story keeps changing, and so do the facts. As he’s pulled deeper into the Langford legacy, Marlowe must choose between reason and the growing belief that Vivienne may not be losing her mind—she may be waking up to something far worse.
A psychological thriller about grief, obsession, and the lies we curate to survive, The Endless Exhibit is a haunting, slow-burning mystery that asks:
What if your entire life was an exhibit… built around a girl no one else believes existed?

trending.title: The Shadow Command
trending.author: alex s
trending.description:
“I don't want the cops.” Thompson resumed. “I want you. You're one of the very best detectives I know," 

A wave of silence passed, causing Thompson to grab his glass and finish whatever drink was left in it. He dropped the glass and turned into his friend one more time. 

“I need you to help me find out who killed my wife and took my daughter.” The words poured out of him slowly. And dangerously. 

Whoever it was, he was going to sniff them out. 

And he was going to make them pay.


*******

After five years of fighting for his country on the battlefield, Thompson Holbrook finally returns home, hoping to reunite with his family. But instead of warm embraces, he is met with tragedy. 

His wife has been brutally murdered, and his daughter has vanished without a trace.
 
Grief nearly consumes him, but before he can process his loss, he is pulled into a larger fight. A deadly terrorist group, The Calvary, is on the verge of unleashing a powerful biochemical weapon that could wipe out the entire country and destroy the continent. 

To stop them, National Security Adviser Jacob Russel recruits Thompson to lead an elite black-ops unit whose sole mission is to take down The Calvary before it's too late. But the deeper they go, the deadlier the mission becomes. Corruption runs deeper than they could ever imagine, and soon, Thompson begins to question who the real enemy is.

Can he dismantle The Calvary, uncover the truth behind his wife’s murder, and rescue his daughter from the shadows before it’s too late?

trending.title: Ace of Spies
trending.author: Ebiama Kismet
trending.description: In the murky world of espionage, Alex Hawke, a battle-scarred spy, hunts the cunning criminal mastermind Viktor Sokolov, whose cyber and biochemical weapons threaten global stability. Navigating betrayal and danger from Vienna to Istanbul, Hawke faces physical wounds and emotional turmoil, haunted by a traitor within. Driven by an unyielding code of justice, he remains a resilient ghost in the chaos, outmaneuvering foes in a high-stakes game. As betrayals deepen, Hawke’s pursuit of Viktor mirrors his own flawed, fierce soul. The world awaits his next move.

trending.title: His Highness’s Forbidden Obsession
trending.author: sillasuzy
trending.description:
“Please let me taste you once, princess,” he breathed against her lips, his body pressing into hers. “Just once.”

Elora’s breath hitched. Her fingers clenched her skirt, her heart pounding as her gaze dropped to his lips. “You…you promised not to touch me,” she whispered. 

“A kiss. No hands, I promise. Only a kiss.” 

********

What could be worse than being an exiled princess? Marrying a creature of the night in the middle of the night!

Princess Elora had just two things in mind. 
One, to recover the lost memories of the sin that led to her exile. 
Two, to experience the outside world again.

What she didn’t expect was being forced into marriage with the second vampire prince of Elyria the moment she finally sees the outside world again. Rafael Thornewood isn’t just any Prince. They say he’s a monster, merciless, unforgiving and worse, cursed to die young. The thing is that her marriage to him comes with a secret mission- murder the monstrous prince to save humanity and return to her kingdom a heroine, or die by his cruel hands. 

But with her heart in the way and an obsessed husband, will she be able to complete the mission?

trending.title: The last date
trending.author: Ayomide Temitope
trending.description:
⚠️ Content Warning

Dear Reader,

Before you dive into this story, I want to give you a gentle heads-up. This book contains some mature and emotional themes, including:

Crime and murder

Mentions of sexual assault

Violence and intense situations

Some sexual content

Law enforcement and criminal investigations

While these elements are part of the plot and character journeys, I understand they can be difficult for some readers. Your comfort is important. If at any point it feels like too much, it’s okay to pause or step away.

Thank you for choosing to read this story, I appreciate you.

Ariel Cole is a sharp-tongued FBI agent with a rocky past and a knack for uncovering dark secrets. But nothing prepares her for the horror that hits too close to home, the brutal murder of a minister’s daughter, found strangled in an abandoned building. The killer left no trace... except a chilling pattern: every victim had one final date with a man no one can identify — and then they died.

When Ariel discovers a strange man saved her life during a chaotic mission, only to disappear without a word — she can’t shake the feeling that he knows more than he should. But the deeper she digs, the more terrifying the puzzle becomes.

Because the next name on the killer’s list might be hers.

And the man she trusts most?

Might be the one hunting her.

trending.title: The Sweetest Lie In The Dark
trending.author: ummuenterprises
trending.description:
"The first girl died in L.A. The second washed up at my feet."

I came to Seabridge Bay to escape the blood on my hands.

As a former LAPD detective, I was done chasing shadows—until the murders followed me with the same ritual, same signs and same nightmare.

That's when I met Damien Cross—a quiet contractor with haunted eyes and dangerous hands. He calms the storm in my head, touches me like he’s the only one who could ever do that…

But, what if he’s not saving me? What if he’s the one I need saving from?

Because someone is killing women. 

And the deeper I fall, the more I wonder— Is the real monster him...or me?

trending.title: Obsession Therapy
trending.author: Lance Rea
trending.description:
Dr. Adrienne Volke doesn’t simply sell fragrance; she offers a unique form of control. Her luxury colognes are lauded for seamlessly blending wellness and allure. Yet, they harbor a covert formula she developed in secret—a scent that manipulates desire, rewires loyalty, and transforms obsession into an extraordinary tool.

Her private files lay bare her intentions. Each subject is meticulously categorized—Needy, Charming, Controlling, Defiant—with every experiment crafting a system more potent than the last. To Adrienne, power equates to unchallenged authority, freedom from abandonment, and eternal remembrance. Control is not granted; it is seized.

Adrienne’s influence over men fuels her obsession, and her genius leads her to believe no one can resist her or escape her reach. However, the very hunger that constructed her empire may one day become its undoing.

Power, however, comes with vulnerabilities. Past subjects carry scars, her brother Noah harbors knowledge she presumed was buried, and Silas, a colleague at her company, is beginning to unravel her concealed schemes. With each new revelation, Adrienne becomes more entrenched in her conviction that her grip cannot be broken.

She sought to create an obsession.  
She yearned for them to obsess over her.  
Yet obsession is complex—and her relentless pursuit of power may ultimately spell her downfall.

trending.title: Betting on Bambi
trending.author: Taylor Ashcraft
trending.description:
I gasped, fear gripping me instantly. My gaze met the black holes in my ski mask. A sharp pain shot through the back of my head, and warm, wet blood trickled down. My mother lay dead in a pool of blood. Someone had broken into my house and killed her, but the culprit pointed to my abusive, alcoholic, and cruel father. I had no proof.

I thought my life would forever be shrouded in the shadow of my mother's death, until I left my hometown and unexpectedly encountered another monster who had bullied me in high school. I was once again drawn into a strange emotional entanglement with him, and even discovered he harbored a dark secret. My already tragic life became even more unpredictable…

trending.title: Red Flags in the Dark
trending.author: ADEYEMI AZEEZ OLUWASEYI
trending.description:
Lena Hart has been hurt before. Badly. So when Ethan Vale walks into her life—handsome, gentle, successful—she doesn’t know whether to trust him or run. He says all the right things. Looks at her like she’s the only woman in the world. For the first time in years, she lets someone in.

But love shouldn't feel like this.

Because soon, women who look just like Lena start turning up dead.

Strangled. No signs of struggle. No forced entry. Each victim wore the same perfume Ethan gifted Lena. Each one met their end after falling for someone who seemed… perfect.

Now Lena is watching everything: his words, his habits, his lies. And she’s asking herself the question she doesn’t want answered—

What if the man she’s falling for is the one hunting her?

As the city panics and the bodies stack up, Lena has two choices: run, or play along long enough to figure out the truth.

But in this game of love and survival, one wrong move could make her the next victim.

trending.title: No One Is Guilty Here
trending.author: ADEYEMI AZEEZ OLUWASEYI
trending.description:
A house burns in the dead of night. A boy screams from inside. Another is arrested on the spot. But neither of them set that fire.

Weeks earlier, Nathan Rourke, a worn-out defense attorney from the city, returned to Hollow Creek—his haunted Southern hometown—after his brother’s sudden death. What was supposed to be a temporary visit becomes permanent when he uncovers chilling truths about the town he left behind.

Nathan takes on two high-profile cases: Elijah Moore, a wealthy teen accused of murdering his father, and Jace Carter, a poor foster kid charged with arson. But in a town where no one is ever found guilty, Nathan finds himself caught between lies passed off as justice, buried family secrets, and a decades-old system built on silence.

As Nathan digs deeper, the lines between his past and present blur. The deeper he searches, the more dangerous it becomes—not just for him, but for the boys whose lives depend on him.

trending.title: Six Strings, One Curse (18+)
trending.author: Organized Chaos
trending.description:
Love can bind. Love can break. Sometimes, it even curses.

In this haunting anthology of paranormal romance and horror, six interwoven tales explore the beautiful, brutal, and often terrifying power of desire. From ghostly lovers to deals forged with death, from divine destinies to deadly obsessions, each story pulls a thread tighter in a tapestry of secrets, sacrifice, and unholy passion.
Story One: Seven-A sorority sister’s twisted “gift” tears a sacred sisterhood apart.
Story Two: Ghosted-A first grade teacher falls for a awkwardly charming stranger—who died years ago.
Story Three: Femme Fatale-A seductive killer unspools the truth behind her blood-stained love affairs.
Story Four: The Saboteur's Heart-A billionaire Athlete plot's to win the nerdy girl’s heart—no matter the cost
Story Five Mercy: A dying man meets Death... and recognizes her face.
Story Six: The Chosen Four- Four girls are chosen by God for a mission that will determine the fate of Earth

Six strings bind them. One curse connects them all 
(Mature) (18+)(Trigger Warnings)

trending.title: Saved from Abduction
trending.author: Renee Winget
trending.description:
Embrey Ericson was taken when she was 16, now she’s 21, between halfway brainwashed and manipulated and the bout of amnesia she’s been suffering she doesn’t remember anything.
Finally, when the newest girl shows up, she’s very vocal and manages to tell the girls that none of them belong there. There is a total of 6 of them 3 of them don’t remember much. Embrey decides to run to get them help she manages to slip away thinking maybe there is someone looking for her as well. Once she’s out of the abandoned town in only a t-shirt and skimpy panties she finds a cabin that has a limited supply, and she takes enough for a few days and after that she is on her own.
Justin Mathers is a 32 year old cop turned PI from Oklahoma; his older sister calls him distraught that her daughter is missing. He leaves right away to help. As he’s investigating where the trace of the SUV snatched her disappeared... he never expected to literally run into a barely clothed girl in the middle of the woods. When she runs into him, she immediately freaks out and begs him not to take her back. He assures her that he won’t take her back. He has to get her out.

He helps her along the journey to finding who she is and to try to get his niece and the other girls back.

trending.title: The Memory Of You
trending.author: BlurryInk
trending.description:
After Ivy Hart’s husband tragically loses his life in a horrific motor accident, her world is set to unravel in ways she never imagined. As she struggles with shocking revelations about her seemingly perfect husband, she finds it hard to believe. When Ivy uncovers the truth behind the crash and the individuals responsible for her husband's death, she stands on the brink of confronting a tangled web of dark secrets that will challenge everything she thought she knew.

Meanwhile, Ivy's children are restless, driven by a burning desire to avenge their father's untimely demise. As the layers of deception begin to peel away, Ivy finds herself drawn into a past she thought was buried, with each secret revealing new twists that could change their lives forever. 

With each revelation, the question looms: can Ivy seek justice when her own hands are not entirely clean? The stakes are growing higher, and the line between right and wrong will blur. 
Find out how Ivy navigates a haunting truth that leads her into an unending mystery. What will be uncovered, and how will it all end?

trending.title: The Ink Beneath The Skin
trending.author: starlight5lttd
trending.description:
I thought I’d seen every kind of corpse this city could cough up. Then they started showing up with tattoos that bled ink and vanished before sunrise.
I’m Detective Reese Calder, and I’ve spent ten years chasing ghosts with human faces. But this case? This one’s different.
These marks aren’t just skin-deep. They’re alive. And somehow, they know me.
Now I’m digging into a pattern no one wants to see — bodies with no connection, no cause of death, just symbols burned into flesh that weren’t there a day before. And the more I investigate, the more the ink spreads — in my thoughts, in my dreams, under my skin.
Someone — or something — is writing a message through the dead. And it’s starting to spell my name.

trending.title: The Missing Roommate
trending.author: starlight5lttd
trending.description:
Rue thought her biggest challenge would be keeping a smile at her father's wedding anniversary, enduring her stepmother's cold stares and her stepsister Cassie's provocations. But when her most trusted friend Jessica sends out a distress call, everything changes.

It was a trap.

When Rue awakens, she finds herself betrayed by her closest friend, her reputation destroyed, and even her father forced to disown her. In desperation, she's rescued by the mysterious Kyle Dag—leader of the Shadow Wolf Pack, a notorious rebel.

But at the same time, Kyle offers a dangerous bargain。

trending.title: His Prey
trending.author: Leigh Frankie
trending.description:
I thought I was just renting my spare room to a perfectly charming gentleman, but I had no idea he was spending his nights buried in my dirty laundry. Oliver Clarke was the definition of safe. He had this boyishly handsome face, a disarming smile, and followed all my strict house rules without a single complaint. He was the kind of guy who bought me coffee and knew exactly when to give me space. But behind the closed door of his bedroom, the "golden boy" act dropped. While I slept just across the hall, he was pressing my stolen, unwashed t-shirt to his face, inhaling my scent like it was a drug. He knew the exact code to my front door. He knew the layout of my life. He was memorizing every single detail about me, watching my every move with a dark, suffocating obsession that he hid perfectly behind his polite grin. I thought I had finally found a quiet, peaceful life. But what happens when the monster living in your house decides that just smelling your clothes isn't enough anymore?
*********
A rainstorm brings Del Teller face to face with Oliver Clarke—charming, persistent, and impossible to ignore. When he unexpectedly becomes her housemate, distance is no longer an option under the same roof.
Del knows better than to trust someone like Oliver… but the more she resists, the harder it becomes to stay away.
Because sometimes, the real danger isn’t falling into trouble—it’s falling for the wrong person.

trending.title: Taken by the Enemy
trending.author: Andrea Kugy
trending.description:
Vanya, a brilliant forensic psychologist, is investigating a string of elite women gone missing across Europe. Her search for truth ends in chains, kidnapped by Damian Volkov, the most dangerous mafia boss in Russia.
But he doesn't want her dead. He wants her broken, bent, and bound to him.
Damian knows her true identity: the daughter of the man who destroyed his family. She was meant to be his revenge.
Until she became his obsession.
And maybe… the only person who could save him from himself.

trending.title: The Girl in Room 324
trending.author: Victoria Enamegbai
trending.description:
Cleo Ainsley, failed author, abandoned by her family, her editor and filled with shake checks into an eerie hotel with the hopes of making a come back in her career.

However, things are never as they seem in Hotel La Rue. Room 324 is not a room that exists.

Her manuscript comes to life but is Cleo really writing fiction or is she writing something she had witnessed?

Cleo realizes she’s no longer in control. Her laptop types without her. Mysterious guests vanish without a trace. And room 324? It’s not a room. It’s a trap.

As her sanity slips, Cleo begins to uncover a terrifying pattern: every writer who stayed in Room 324 has vanished, including Morgan Melroy, a woman whose manuscript matches Cleo’s word for word.


Detective Fournier enters into the scene haunted by the Morgan case and notices a similar pattern in Cleo. 

Does Cleo know more?

Is Morgan really dead?

What is the mystery behind room 324?

trending.title: One Night of Passion and Death
trending.author: saad sholagberu
trending.description:
One night. That’s all Detective Samantha Cross wanted.
One night to forget the rules.
One night to feel something other than pressure, guilt, and routine.
One night to do something reckless—just like her friends begged her to.
But the morning after brings more than regret.
She wakes up in a hotel room… and walks straight into the biggest case of her career:
The Governor’s daughter, murdered in the room next to hers.

And her number one suspect?
The same dangerously charming stranger she just slept with.
His name? Rowan Drake.
His profession? One of the country’s most elusive con artists.
His alibi? Her.
Samantha knows he didn’t do it. She was with him.
But if she admits that, she risks everything—her badge, her reputation, her career.
Now, trapped between duty and desire, she’s forced into an impossible alliance.
To clear his name, she’ll have to work side by side with the man who could ruin her.
And as the lies close in and the body count rises, one truth becomes dangerously clear:
The real killer is still out there…
And he’s watching them both.

trending.title: Her Obsession.
trending.author: Sheridan Hartin
trending.description:
He kills without mercy. She loves without reason. And nothing will stop her from having him.

For three years, Mafia leader Conner O’Neill has felt eyes on him. A phantom touch in the night. Perfume lingering on his pillows. Warm cookies in his oven. Enemies' heads delivered to his doorstep, gift-wrapped in bloodied silk. It isn’t fear that coils in his gut—it’s fascination. Someone is watching him. Someone who knows him. Someone who kills for him.

Her name is Sage—and she’s been his shadow since the night he unknowingly stole her heart with a bullet to another man’s brain. For her, it was love at first sight. Violent. Beautiful. Inevitable. Raised in darkness, owned by a monster, Sage was never meant to love. But Conner changed that. And she’s been his ever since, waiting for the day she can step out of the shadows and into his arms.

But the man who owns her doesn’t let go of his toys. And the man she loves doesn’t know she exists—yet.

She’s done watching. It’s time he learns the truth.

He belongs to her. And she’ll kill anyone who tries to take him away.

trending.title: SECRETS BENEATH THE WAVES
trending.author: Joy Daniel
trending.description: When Maya Chen moved to the quiet beach town of Millbrook Bay, she thought she was getting away to peace. But 48 hours after she opens her private detective business, she finds a dead teenager on the beach and learns that this quiet town hides some very dangerous secrets. When people in the area tell her to stop digging and strange things start to happen, Maya has to use all of her detective skills to find out what's going on. But as she digs deeper, she finds that Millbrook Bay is linked to her past in ways she never thought possible.

trending.title: Beneath the Lies
trending.author: Maria
trending.description:
A crime. A love from the past. A woman torn between guilt and the truth.

Fernanda seems to live a perfect life: she is the wife of a powerful real estate mogul. But when he is brutally murdered, she becomes the prime suspect.

The detective assigned to the case?
Hermes—her unforgettable, passionate love from the past.

They once shared an intense romance that neither could forget. But fate tore them apart. Now, they meet again under the shadow of a crime with dark motives and buried secrets.

Is Fernanda a cold-blooded killer, capable of eliminating her own husband?
Or is she the victim of a cruel conspiracy?

Amid twists, long-hidden truths, and desires that never died, Hermes will have to face both his feelings—and the truth.

trending.title: The Last Show
trending.author: Sandy
trending.description:
He’s a mercenary.
She’s an innocent young woman.
He seeks only revenge.
She longs for love.
He’s a protector.
She will need to be protected.

Beneath the circus lights, nothing is as it seems.
At Crow Circus, the show hides a stage of betrayal, vengeance, and dark secrets.

Jack Crow was once a young dreamer, destined to inherit his father’s legacy—the command of the circus. But a cruel betrayal changed his fate forever. Betrayed by those he called friends, Jack was thrown from a moving train and left for dead. No one expected him to survive. But he did, and what returned was no longer the same man. Disfigured and consumed by pain, he became something far more dangerous.

Ten years later, the masked clown returns to the circus. But he’s not there to entertain. He is cold, ruthless, and has spent a decade planning every detail of his revenge. One by one, the traitors will pay.

However, even Jack wasn't prepared for Selly. The aerial ballerina, with a pure soul and mesmerizing beauty, awakens something in him he thought was lost—his humanity.
Selly, a girl marked by a tragic past and silenced by childhood trauma, is the light breaking through Jack’s darkness. But what they share runs deeper than attraction. Their fates are bound by a web of secrets that trace back to the night everything changed.

With Christmas approaching and the spotlight shining on Crow Circus, Jack prepares his grand return: an unforgettable performance of justice, revenge, and devastating revelations.

Get ready for the final act, where love and vengeance collide. And under the big top, there will be no escape for the traitors.

trending.title: The Missing Women
trending.author: JJ Rams
trending.description:
Twenty-year-old rising TV reporter Alisha Murphy seems to have it all—beauty, brains, a perfect career, and an attractive boyfriend. But her latest assignment takes a dark turn when she investigates the chilling disappearances of eleven young women, all with the same initials: A.M. 

As she follows the clues, she uncovers a terrifying pattern that leads back to one place—her boyfriend’s bar. What Alisha finds hidden beneath the floorboards is a nightmare beyond imagination. Now, she’s the final piece in a twisted ritual, and the only way to survive is to play along... until she can strike.

trending.title: Cupid On East 89th Street
trending.author: Eso
trending.description:
“Promise me you’re not dangerous," I whispered.
He smiled. “I make no promises I can’t keep.”

Eliot is everything I shouldn’t want—smooth voice, slow hands, secrets buried behind those blue eyes. I’m just a receptionist with a loud mouth and a habit of falling too fast. But someone is killing again. Every 13th, killing only lawyers and leaving letters carved  behind the ear.

They say love is blind. Mine might be fatal.

Because Eliot’s hiding something and I’m the girl who finds it and I realize that Cupid wasn't shooting arrows, it was something else.

But the question is, will he kiss me one last time—
Or leave me with a letter carved behind my ears?

rising.title: Alpha Things
rising.author: SimiB
rising.description:
What happens when you are born to be the ruler of the supernatural world. to rule it like the way you grew up to see your father and forefathers. when you desperately want to fill in their shoes but can't? Why? Because there is someone else with the same potential and might be slightly better than you?

What happens if you see your birthright taken away from you and not just by someone random, but by someone who was supposed to be with you, love you, cherish you, and be with you for the rest of your life.

He is your mate but doesn't want to acknowledge it or share the glory with you or by your side but rather wants to cut you off completely? And doesn't even want to give you an explanation?

Is a power greater than love? does the term soulmate mean nothing to him?

How heartless can one be?

Come along in the journey of love, hate, and betrayal with Alejandro King, the heir to the throne and most hated being in the werewolf world

rising.title: The Forbidden Lust
rising.author: lovelivelust
rising.description:
Ben has always been best at what he does, he's handsome, tall, kind-hearted, and cheerful. That shouldn't be the result of growing up with parents who rejected his sexual orientation. 

But he learned how to survive when he run away from home. Ben knows how to mingle with the right people and have the guts to take jobs that would support him.

His life was doing just fine, he was happy, he was financially okay, until one day he was terrorized by one of his clients.

*****

Jasper is a straight man, he grew up to be a paralegal, have a safe job for his boring kind of life. He was satisfied with what he had accomplished in life, he thought he was happy, until he met Ben.

Until he was falling for the one sugar baby he shouldn't have.

*****

Warning! R-Rated for 18+ due to strong, explicit language and sexual content*

rising.title: Arranged Marriage With My Devilish Step Brother

Abused and constantly used by his mom, Steve's mom arranges a marriage between his step brother Ash and him. Steve knew it was for her own selfish desire but he was happy because he was in love with his step brother, but Steve didn't know that Ash only agreed because he wanted to make make him suffer because he hated Steve because he was birthed by a selfish woman. Steve suffers humiliation and constantly abused by his Ash.  Ash constantly treats him like a sex tool, When he finally makes his mind to leave Ash, he finds out he's pregnant for his him but  because he thinks Ash would find it disgusting Steve decides to hide his pregnancy from him and leave.

Dear readers and Viewers, explore the Love/Hate relationship between Ash and Steve, Steve's undying love for his Step-brother and Ash's never ending hatred for him. His determination to make Ash return his love back, with all humiliation Steve  isn't one to give up so easily.

When Kayden Brane finds out that Ijin Lee is broken, he tries to make Ijin Lee's heart of stone fall in love.

rising.title: Sinful Desires
rising.author: Author
rising.description:
Lucas Edgar, the star football quarterback's perfect life came to a crash when he went to the hospital to sort out his  "sex issues" just to get attended by Doctor Arnold Thomas, the cute nerdy one-night-stand guy that made him question his sexuality. 


Arnold Thomas was fiercely drawn to Lucas, aware of the electrifying  chemistry they share but is Arnold willing to fight for Lucas's love at the risk 
of getting fired for having a relationship with his patient? 


Dive in, to experience the romantic rainbow tales of this unlikely duo and how their love for each other encouraged them to face the school, workplace and family head-on!

rising.title: Trapped In The World I Am Meant To Save
rising.author: Vanessa S
rising.description:
Ness is tired of her predictable life—arguing with her family, working a dead-end job, and daydreaming about the kind of grand adventures she reads about in books. So when her best friend Joe suggests a trip to the infamous RoseWood Park, a forest rumored to swallow people whole, she doesn’t hesitate.

Trapped in a nightmare world where time moves differently, they encounter two boys who disappeared decades ago yet never aged. 

The forest gives adventures... but at what cost?

rising.title: The King's Lover
rising.author: Hien Minh
rising.description:
"It seems you are still not satisfied. Let me give it a try then."
"You’re crazy! Let go of me!"
"Be still and behave yourself for me."
Slap
"Today, I shall teach you a lesson."
"I have done nothing against morality and ethics; what gives you the right to question me?"
"The right, you ask? Ever since you set foot in the palace of Helios Kingdom, you have been mine. Today, I will show you what rights I have over you."
"Listen well: from now on, you belong only to me."

*********************
From being a superstar with millions of admiring fans, he suddenly finds himself trapped in a tragic yaoi script, becoming the consort of a handsome yet ruthless emperor. To him, this is nothing short of a nightmare. Where is his dignity, where is the pride of a superstar? He can’t bear to play this role any longer. He wants to escape this cursed script and return to being the superstar he once was. Someone, save me…

rising.title: The Bull's Beloved

This book contains sex, gore, violence, swearing, nudity, and the occasional silly antic.
Few look the Battle Bull in his reddish-brown eyes. As a seven-foot-tall, Greek, nearly 425-pound man... he sticks out. The King of Halves fought for Urth with the other supernatural Kings, and the best they could do was get the Tyrant, the Realm King, to sleep. Yet, even that victory and his accomplishments mean little.
Even though he still serves the people, many murmur behind his back. As an officer, he vowed to keep the peace despite this. He even lost his partner, being unable to die himself. What’s worse, is that the Chief thinks a human replacement is a good idea.
Noah is a poor young, 25 year old man desperate to help his family. His father's injuries from a war crippled him, which made his family poor. Their saving grace was his father's heroic act of saving his fellow soldier, and for it, even when all seemed lost, Noah's offered a job that pays too much, and is too good to be true. The man he saved is the Chief of Police, the unicorn Jerold works with to keep the peace, but all hell breaks out when they meet.
A/N: Of all my projects, I think this one has been the most requested. This series resides on a world where conflicts that involve race, sexuality, and gender didn't happen. Nobody cares if you're straight or not, the Church of the Light's priority is dealing with supernatural altercations, and protecting the humans by letting the masses remain ignorant.
In this world, a treaty was made in 1605 that supernatural creatures cannot hunt humans in the streets like the old times, to do so is to be laid upon the Ring of the Sun.

rising.title: The King's Curse: All The King's Men
rising.author: Deborah
rising.description:
Daniel was in the lion's den once again, but this time, the lion was hungry and craving fresh blood, it didn't look like anyone would shut its mouth. Worst still, the lion king hates gay, and he wants them eliminated from his kingdom, because of his ongoing curse… Daniel.
.......
King Lazarus stood on his balcony, looking at the crying young man. He couldn't understand why he felt pity for Daniel, but seeing his crystal clear eyes on the full moon made him understand that Daniel wasn't an ordinary boy, and the look of vengeance in his eyes got him super curious. As he watched him enter the carriage, his eyes gleamed in curiosity.

rising.title: The Mafia Lord Priceless Pet
rising.author: Anita Queen
rising.description: Maverick had always thought his life was just like any other young man's life until he went on his first mission. They were Mafia gay couples, and he was supposed to spy on them while they act ruthless. rising.description: One night, Zharies (a poor orphan boy) helps Gerry (a mobster's son) who has escaped from his match night. A deal between them emerges for each other's benefit. Zharies has a big secret and he calls it ‘Jinx’. He always hides it from everyone after the bad things that happened in his past, but it also leads him to a love triangle full of dilemmas and intrigues.

rising.title: The Alpha's Maid Luna
rising.author: emorymayy
rising.description:
They accused me of killing my parents. The pack—once my family—turned their backs on me. My mate rejected me without a word. My wolf—my soul—was bound and silenced, leaving me broken, hollow.
I was forced to serve as a maid in the pack I once called home. Every day was a torment—mocked, humiliated, tortured by those I should have trusted most. I was a shadow, consumed by pain and despair.
Then he came.
Caesar—the most feared Alpha in the world. The conqueror. I should have feared him. And I did. But when his eyes met mine, something shifted. For the first time, someone saw me, not the broken girl, but me. His touch was gentle, his kiss beneath the first snow a promise I wasn’t alone anymore.
In his childhood cave, he healed my fears and scars, worshipping my broken pieces like they were sacred. I thought we’d be together forever—until he made me his Luna and declared I was an Alpha too. His love didn’t just protect me; it was meant to make me strong enough to protect myself.
“They tried to break you,” he whispered, his voice steady. “But I’ll be the one to heal you.”
He claimed me—body, soul, heart—and vowed to protect me at any cost. But can a girl, betrayed and erased, truly belong to a man who owns everything? And can love born from so much pain ever be enough to save us both?

Even more shocking is Chase's professed love for him, which causes Austin's heart to falter and complex emotions to weave their way through his mind.

rising.title: The Crown Prince's Love
rising.author: Basa
rising.description:
Randy, the Crown Prince has secretly been crushing on his child hood friend, Desmond which he knows very well as him being insane.

rising.title: The Infernal Grace
rising.author: Dian Arum
rising.description: Jou Porska, a student bullied for being gay falls in love with two popular students at his school. His life changes after he goes to an art exhibition in the city after school. He always goes there to cheer up his heart, but this time he found something different. His life destiny changed, he entered into a different dimension and moved the wheels of the story as a different person, but the surprising thing was that the two people he loved were played again by two great entities in another universe. What is the next step of Jou's life destiny?

rising.title: Whispers in Greenwich Village
rising.author: Catie Barnett
rising.description:
Her current chapter explored a love story between two women in 1950s New York – a time of profound social constraint and hidden desires. Based on interviews with older queer women, the narrative revealed extraordinary resilience.
"Sometimes," Sarah told Rebecca, "the most radical act is simply existing. Refusing to be erased."
The typewriter continued its percussive rhythm. Each keystroke was an act of documentation, of resistance.

rising.title: Bonding with the Dark Demon
rising.author: Morningale

**I have spent years living in the Underworld, a place of unending darkness where evil flourishes and evil is born. Returning to the Human Realm was supposed to be boring. My intention was to go unnoticed through this fragile world. And yet, all it took was him to shatter my plans.

Avaris, a young nobleman betrayed and orphaned by those he trusted, faces death at every turn. His dark thoughts, driven by a desperate need for revenge, call forth Dyvian, a very powerful demon that has been dormant for years.

Dyvian grants Avaris's wishes, but at a steep price. However, their encounter causes an unexpected connection, binding their fates and weakening Dyvian's demonic powers.

Dyvian has to face his inner demons as his strength weakens. Now linked to Dyvian, Avaris must contend with a threat to both his and Dyvian's lives as Dyvian is forced to bring Avaris into his world of darkness. 

Amidst the darkness, a forbidden attraction blossoms.

rising.title: Silk Chains and spotlight

Ciel Reid is no stranger to scandal. As a rebellious actor with a bad-boy reputation, he's clawed his way to fame, leaving a trail of chaos. But when his career teeters on the edge of ruin, a lifeline appears in the form of Xerxes Laurent—a ruthless CEO with secrets as dark as his suits.
Xerxes offers him a chance to reclaim his stardom, but there’s a catch: a contract for a fake engagement that will make Ciel his pawn. What begins as a twisted business deal soon becomes a high-stakes game of power, desire, and betrayal.
In Silk Chains and Spotlight, passion burns, loyalties shatter, and nothing is what it seems.

rising.title: Magnetism

He is Milan, always have been in love, secretly with his best friend Eron. Who is actually his stepbrother after his dad get marry with a widow woman who had a child of 19 years old... Eron. "Family is the most important thing, Eron."

It is typical to think that you should care about those who, according to the rules of modern society, love you the most. But does owning the same blood connection make the affective connection between people? I want to know if I am the only one who is wrong.

rising.title: Howl of the Heart (Until you’re Mine)
rising.author: Aisha Bosun
rising.description:

He’s a werewolf forced to live among humans, hiding his strength and primal instincts to keep his kind safe. When Liam’s antagonism goes too far, Jayden vows revenge, but beneath the hatred, an unexpected attraction ignites. Will Jayden tame the beast within, or will his growing desire for Liam spell disaster for them both?

rising.title: A Time Called You

My heart skips as my breath ceased, he had me trapped between him and the table.

However, would that stop Alan's longing heart?

R18+, M/M/F, Taboo

Cerci:

rising.title: From deep down to high up
rising.author: Mary Last
rising.description:
"I never believed in soulmates, but how do you explain the feeling of déjà vu when her eyes meet mine? How do you explain the certainty that I’ve known her forever, even when we’ve only just met?"
Emma’s life is a mess. Recovering from a devastating breakup with her controlling ex-boyfriend, she’s determined to rebuild herself—piece by piece, step by step. But the summer holidays drag on, her attempts at distraction failing, and loneliness starts to creep in. Enter Alice, her mischievous best friend, who dares Emma to take a leap into the unfamiliar world of online dating.
What Emma doesn’t expect is Irene—a stunning, confident, and enigmatic girl with a mischievous sense of humor and eyes that seem to hold the weight of centuries. Their connection is instant, electric, and utterly consuming. But just as Emma starts to believe she’s found something real, Irene drops a bombshell: she’s not looking for anything serious, and her heart might already belong to someone else.
Conflicted but unable to let go, Emma agrees to stay in Irene’s orbit, even if it means risking her heart all over again. As their relationship deepens, Emma can’t shake the feeling that she’s known Irene far longer than a few short weeks. Could their connection be something more—a bond forged long before their paths crossed in this life?
Will Emma risk her heart again for a love that feels destined, or will Irene’s walls prove impossible to break? And if soulmates truly exist, what happens when one of them refuses to believe?

rising.title: The Bad Boy's Dirty Little Secret BL

Kai Hunter is H University’s biggest player and heartbreaker. Known for his good looks and for being one of the brightest students on campus, he is one of the most eligible bachelors that everyone wants to ‘tame’. However, everything changes when freshman Night Winters becomes his new dorm mate.
Kai is instantly attracted to the hot, young freshman who he had caught having a one-night stand at a bar and hasn’t been able to get out of his mind ever since. Night is openly gay, but Kai has been into girls his whole life…or so he thought. Can he let go of his pride and accept Night for who he is? Or will Night forever be forced to be just his dirty little secret, under the sheets, inside the closed doors to their dorm?

rising.title: Seduced By My Stepmother

I never thought my life could change so much in such a short time. Losing my mom was devastating, but being left in the care of Clara, my distant and seemingly cold stepmother, felt like an additional punishment. We were two strangers sharing the same house, bound by grief and silence.

But then, something shifted. Small gestures, lingering looks, and an unexpected closeness began to break down the walls between us. Clara, with her calm demeanor and quiet strength, made me feel something I never thought possible—something forbidden, dangerous.

I know I shouldn’t. I know she’s fighting this too. But with each passing day, it’s impossible to ignore what happens when we’re together. I don’t know if this is love or if we’re just trying to fill the void left by loss. All I know is that I’m being seduced by Clara... and I can’t resist.

***MPREG Romance***
“No, I don’t want this… I don’t want you.”

Even as the words left his mouth, Ronan's hands moved without his command, his fingers curling into Dimitri’s linen shirt, as if pulling him closer rather than pushing him away.

Dimitri's hand moved instinctively to the back of Ronan’s neck, pulling him forward, and as their lips brushed, Dimitri felt something raw and primal surge through him.

“I can’t… stop. What is this feeling, Ronan?”

He had to claim him. And there was nothing either of them could do to stop it now.

******

When a looming human threat forces vampires and werewolves into a fragile alliance, vampire prince Dimitri DeLacroix is arranged to wed Selene Steele, the powerful daughter of the werewolf envoy.

But when Selene vanishes on the eve of the union, she leaves behind chaos. With the treaty hanging by a thread, her brother Ronan steps forward to take her place.

Now, two powerful leaders are bound in a union neither wants. And an ancient law demands they consummate their bond or risk breaking the pact and reigniting the war.

As sparks fly and tempers flare, desire takes root in their reluctant connection. But just as walls begin to crumble between them, Ronan is faced with a truth that shakes him to the core: he is an omega, and he is carrying Dimitri’s child.

Caught between passion and politics, Dimitri and Ronan must navigate a treacherous path. For their unborn child carries a power that could unite or destroy their world.

rising.title: One Night With the Enemy (Omegaverse)
rising.author: Anna Kendra
rising.description:
“Forget about everything else, Elyse,” Kyle said, his hand slipping into the waistband of his boxers. “Just you, me…and this moment.”
Elyse Thompson knew that Kyle MacGyver was his enemy, his competitor for the billion dollar Viker’s project. But lost in the throes of his rut, inside the closed space of the elevator, he has no choice but to rely on his worst enemy to help relieve his desires. 
Just for one night, he told himself. After all, he was a committed man, someone with a stable partner, and Kyle was just…helping him. But that one night becomes an unforgettable memory that neither of them can deny and as desire burns hotter than loyalty, will Elyse be able to face his lover again, despite knowing that he now has growing feelings for his enemy? And has Kyle really been sincere with Elyse all this time, or is it just his ploy to make his enemy fall for him…and get rid of him for good?

rising.title: Obsession's Edge
rising.author: bjanine085
rising.description:
Ryuuji is the eldest son of the Hataki family and heir to the infamous Hebi gang. After spending six months in juvenile detention, he finds himself eager to indulge in everything he was deprived of.  

On his first night of freedom, Ryuuji meets Mat, a serious and incredibly attractive young man. Amidst late-night conversations, teasing, and passion, they develop an intriguing relationship. However, everything could change when they discover they belong to rival gangs.  

Consumed by his obsessions, Ryuuji agrees to set aside their differences to stay with Matias, but this won’t be easy since Matias refuses to have any connection with a Hataki—especially with a gang war on the horizon.  

A dark romance filled with intrigue, heat, and intense, obsessive, and desire-driven characters.

rising.title: My Boss
rising.author: luunamarcelo
rising.description:
Cara Greene, who planned everything in her life met Alexandra Williams, her Boss who was exactly opposite of what she believes in.

Working together brings them closer, they became friends and comfortable with each other even with their own differences.

Opposites do really attracts, but none of them are admitting it.

They are friends, they say. 

They are straight, they say. 

Or are they really?

rising.title: The Billionaire CEO Perfect Submissive
rising.author: Miracle Desmond
rising.description:
Stand up and strip now !” He ordered, and without hesitation, I stripped off my clothes. I stood completely naked in front of him, my dick proudly pointing in his direction.

“Are you sure you are ready to do this? Once you begin, you won't stop until I cum and I want you to swallow every drop of my sperm. Understood?

“Y…yes, Master.” I breathed.

“Good boy, now suck.” He ordered.

*******************************
All Nelson wanted was to forget his horrible experience. To forget how he was raped by two men in the bathroom of a nightclub. He moved to a new city where he met Lucious, his student's elder brother. And from that moment, his life changed automatically.

Lucious, a dominant and loves to have control over his submissives. He is a controlling freak and excessively strict. Will Nelson tame this beast? 

Will he leave his past behind and submit him totally? Will they find closure in each other's embrace?

rising.title: The Billionaire's Rival Heir
rising.author: Marsy Estero
rising.description:
When Atlas Sinclair, the rebellious heir to a billion-dollar empire, is forced into a corporate marriage to secure his family's business, he expects a meek, easy-to-control partner. Instead, he gets Kieran Laurent—his father’s biggest business rival’s son, a self-made billionaire with a reputation as a ruthless dealmaker.

Their arranged engagement is purely strategic—meant to unite two of the most powerful business dynasties. But behind closed doors, their battle for dominance begins. Atlas refuses to be controlled, and Kieran has no intention of playing the obedient fiancé. Sparks fly, tempers clash, and their boardroom battles turn into dangerously intimate encounters.

As the wedding date looms, their rivalry transforms into a high-stakes game of power and seduction. But when betrayals from their past threaten everything, will they fight for their business empires—or for each other?

rising.title: Nikolai the mafia don and the assassin
rising.author: Marlize Mans
rising.description:
Angela Leventis is one of the most notorious assassins in the criminal underworld, earning her the nickname "Angel of Death." She's infamous for her ability to carry out hits without leaving a trace behind.

One night, she hits up a club in Las Vegas with her sister and unexpectedly crosses paths with mafia heir Nikolai Vasillios. To her shock, she wakes up the next morning in his hotel room, with a ring on her finger.

Nikolai Vasillios is the most feared mafia boss out there, known for treating women like disposable items. What chaos will ensue when he discovers he’s married to the woman he partied with the night before? And what about the fact that his father has already picked out a bride for him?

Can Angela escape this drunken marriage and keep her true identity under wraps? Will Nikolai stand up to his father and reject the bride chosen for him, or will the assassin and the mafia don find themselves falling for each other?

rising.title: Falling For My Ex's Uncle
rising.author: Anu Oni
rising.description:
Katrina Ford thought she had it all with Matt Hamilton. But when she catches him in bed with her best friend, Melissa, her world shatters. He gives her divorce papers ending her happiness in a blink. 

"You're just a nuisance, Kat. Sign the papers and get out of my life." Matt eyed her. 

Kat is broken and hurt. She vows to make them pay. She shocks them when it is revealed she is the heir to a European sovereign's fortune. Kat sets out to destroy the Hamiltons for good.

"I'll bring you to your knees, Melissa. I'll destroy all of you!" Kat sneered. 

But then she meets Percy Hamilton, a billionaire architect with the face of a god. Their explosive encounter sparks a forbidden romance, but can Kat trust him? After all, he's a Hamilton. 

"I love you, Kat." Percy admitted in the heat of passion. 

"I love fucking you." Kat moaned. 

Kat's revenge reveals secrets and new alliances are formed but also enemies. Will her thirst for vengeance consume her, or will the love she denies redeem her?

rising.title: The Cursed Bruma
rising.author: shirley
rising.description:
She was sold to a monster.   The monsters refused to let her go.🫦

Anna was delivered to the supernatural underworld's most feared mafia boss—a death sentence she wasn't supposed to survive. Among werewolves and vampires, she learned fast: she wasn't a guest or a prize. She was property. Until her blood awakened.

Magic exploded through her veins. Power answered her fear.   She was Bruma—a witch born to rule, not obey.

Two brothers claimed her. Adam, the savage werewolf Alpha and mafia heir, takes what he wants without apology.

Maxwell, the ruthless vampire judge, binds her with control sharper than steel.
They desire her.   They fight for her.   They will never let her go.

Trapped between fangs and claws, obsession and dominance, Anna bears their children, survives their betrayals, and rises from sold girl to something far more dangerous.
Because in a world ruled by monsters,   the deadliest thing she can become is their queen.

rising.title: Forbidden Bond
rising.author: Eva Monroe
rising.description:
Connor looked up at me then, his eyes burning with an intense amber fire. "Say it again," he commanded, pressing one thick finger slowly inside me. "My name."
"Connor," I repeated, the word catching in my throat as he curled his finger, making stars burst behind my eyelids. "Please." 
I, the princess of the vampire court, was begging a werewolf. The thought should have horrified me, but as he added a second finger alongside the first, stretching me deliciously, shame was the furthest thing from my mind.
He crawled up my body, his movements fluid and predatory, his erection pressing hard against my thigh. I reached between us, wrapping my fingers around his length, feeling him pulse in my grip. His breath hissed between his teeth, his forehead dropping to rest against mine. 
"I've imagined this," he confessed roughly as my hand stroked him, "but reality puts fantasy to shame." 
I guided him to my entrance, my body trembling with anticipation. "Show me," I whispered, abandoning the last of my reservations. "Show me what you've imagined." 

******

Princess Elizabeth Blackwood is the perfect vampire royalty: cold, composed, and dutiful. For three centuries, she has played the political game, preparing for a loveless marriage to strengthen her family's bloodline. But everything changes when the Blood Moon approaches and Alpha Connor, the leader of the enemy Werewolf pack, crashes her ball with a shocking declaration: they are Fated Mates.
Thrust into a conflict that threatens the fragile peace between their species, Elizabeth must choose between her duty to her people and the undeniable, forbidden pull towards the wolf who claims her.
But can a vampire princess and a werewolf alpha truly bridge centuries of animosity, or will their love be the spark that ignites a devastating war?

rising.title: To protect what’s mine
rising.author: Winter Rowe
rising.description: Amalie is more special than she ever thought possible. Why would the twenty-two-year-old think any different after she has been told she’s nothing for her whole life by her family? Adoptive mother of a three-year-old, Ama has been locked up by her family for the past seven years. But everything changes when her old friends, the Alpha twins, Markus and Calyx, take over the Moonstone pack. Finding out that the twins are her mates, she is a white wolf, and has a connection to the Moon Goddess, is just icing on the cake of her life is a huge mess. Ama just wants a normal life with her mates and protecting her pup, but life rarely gives us what we want. She is thrust into world that she no longer remembers and has forgotten her. Amalie is charged with protecting those closest to her. But she has her own past to overcome as she heals and attempts to move forward. Will she come out alive or lose herself along the way? After all, someone has to be pulling the strings, why not pull her along for the ride?

rising.title: THE MAFIA'S FIGHTER ROSE
rising.author: Audra Torres
rising.description:
Trigger Warning: This book contains themes of non-consensual and dub-con encounters, bondage, explicit sexual content, stalking, kidnapping, physical and emotional abuse, mafia violence, and obsessive behavior. Read at your own risk.


A ruthless underground street fighter by night and feared mafia don by blood,Rafael De Rossi is known for his wrath, scars, and brutal silence. His fists speak more than his words, and no one dares to get close until a quiet, innocent girl named Raelyn Hart crosses his path.


 Small, delicate, and with a heart too pure for his world, Raelyn is the exact opposite of everything Raffaele knows. She always flinches at his anger. And that... infuriates him.

But he can’t stay away.

She was just a florist. A nobody. Until she witnessed something she shouldn't have.

Now Raffaele has to protect her. Even if it means dragging her into his violent world of fists, fire, and mafia vendettas.
*******
Raelyn Hart was just closing up her flower shop when she witnesses a cold-blooded murder in a dark alley one committed by Rafael De Rossi, the infamous underground fighter and heir to the Lupa Nera mafia. Before she can scream, he grabs her and takes her with him, claiming it’s to keep her quiet. But instead of killing her, Rafael locks her in his penthouse, watches her every move, and forbids her from leaving. It becomes clear that Rafael is not just protecting the mafia’s secret; he’s been obsessed with her for months, watching her from the shadows, visiting her shop anonymously, memorizing her routines.

rising.title: Oop's I Married The Billionaire Playboy
rising.author: The Guitarist
rising.description:
I never dreamed I'd marry Art William Jr.—a billionaire CEO, tabloid sensation, and New York's most notorious playboy.
He was sullen, domineering, and barely looked at me—except at night, when he couldn't sleep alone and would sneak into my bed and torture me with stolen kisses like a psychopath.
Our marriage was a sham. I was living in hell of luxury, and he was the prince of that hell. I thought it was going to be boring, until things got complicated—I unexpectedly became pregnant with his child.
I decided to run, to escape it all. But when love and betrayal threatened to destroy everything, could I escape unscathed?

rising.title: The Enforcer
rising.author: Caelum Cayden
rising.description:
"Just so you know," Seline panted, clutching to his shoulders as her life depended on it. "I HATE YOU."
Kade's gaze darkened, and in one swift motion, he thrust into her. Hard and fast.
"I."
Thrust.
"Hate."
Thrust.
"You."
Thrust.
"Too."
Thrust. "So fucking much that if it's not for this pussy, I would have killed you a long time ago."
She smirked. "The feeling is mutual."
One arranged marriage. A peace agreement between two powerful families. What can go wrong?
Everything. Because they hate each other. So much that they don't care about the agreement. It was a hate at first sight. Blood will never cease to flow. There is only one problem. Lust. 

In a world carved by blood and loyalty, a fragile truce binds two rival mafia clans—Marcellus and Dufort. As part of the peace pact, Seline Dufort is supposed to marry Luca Marcellus. But after his mysterious disappearance, she was give to Luca's cousin, Kade Marcellus, a ruthless mafia don known for burying his enemies in silence.
To him, she's a mute, docile girl—easy to control, easy to forget.
But Selina is neither. She can speak. She remembers everything. And she has one goal: destroy the man who once ruined her life.
But revenge gets complicated when hatred burns into obsession… and the man she’s meant to ruin starts looking like the only one who ever truly saw her.
What happens when the girl who swore revenge becomes the woman he can’t let go of and the silence between them is more dangerous than any war?

rising.title: The Dragon Queen Selection
rising.author: Fireheart.
rising.description:
Thirteen women 

Only one Dragonrider who is the Crown Prince.
 
The Dragon Queen Selection is a special selection to pick the next dragon queen from the finest daughters of the founding magical noble families. Thirteen girls, one from each family are chosen to compete for the crown and to become the next dragon queen and the future wife of Crown Prince Cassian, the best dragon rider in the three kingdoms and the rider of  the thousand year old ancient powerful dragon Taheer. 
Among them is Lira. Lira is not a noble, she has no powers, she is an impostor. Driven by revenge, she has infiltrated the selection to destroy the royal family that had unjustly executed her father, a former advisor accused of treason. Her plan, Kill the Prince.

rising.title: Sins Of Temptation
rising.author: Excel Arthur
rising.description:
He's her father's best friend. She's a forbidden fruit. Some hungers destroy everything.

Nineteen-year-old Aria Moretti returns from university a woman—curves in all the right places, storm-grey eyes that promise sin, and a dangerous obsession with the one man she can never have.

Dominic Romano is forty, lethal, and her father's most trusted enforcer. He's spent years fighting his attraction to his best friend's daughter. But when he becomes her bodyguard for one explosive summer, his iron control begins to crack.

Every stolen glance burns. Every "accidental" touch ignites. Every whispered conversation in the dark pushes them closer to the edge of no return.

When Aria's enemies strike, Dominic will unleash hell to save her—even if it means betraying the only family he's ever known. Because some love is worth burning the world down for.

But in a world of blood and bullets, can forbidden love survive? Or will their sins destroy them both?

*A dark mafia romance with a morally gray hero, a fearless heroine who knows what she wants, and enough heat to melt your kindle. Not for the faint of heart.*

Age gap • Forbidden love • Protective hero • Steamy scenes • HEA guaranteed

rising.title: The Alpha's Lunar Crown
rising.author: crystalmonroe65
rising.description:
When my mate dumps me in front of two entire packs, it can’t get worse—until I realized I was pregnant.
Seadon
Our engagement was meant to unite two werewolf packs.
Then one accusation turned me into public enemy number one.
I thought my mate would stand by me—instead, he ended our bond in front of everyone and left me to bear the blame alone.

With no other choice, I fled to the human world, raising the little one whose fuzzy ears pop out at the worst times. I thought I’d finally outrun the wolf-pack drama—until danger found me again.

And guess who shows up like a hero? The same alpha who walked away.
He swears he’ll clear my name and protect me, but there’s something he doesn’t know.
There’s a tiny pair of eyes watching him from behind the door—our son.
Alex

rising.title: Reclaiming His Mate
rising.author: crystalmonroe65
rising.description:
I‘ve been living in cracks, and now it's time to break free…
I was an unshifted nobody while he’s a bellicose leader of the other pack.
Our lives should be a world apart.
But to everyone’s shock, I was revealed to be his fated mate.

His rejection was so close to the bone that I fell into pieces.
Worse still, my adopted sister plotted to annex his territory and then get rid of me.
The world had ditched me until he came to my aid…
We tended wounds and soothed souls for each other. It seemed he can’t say no to me anymore…
But everything we knew began to crumble: dragon shifters lurked in the dark, and some intrigue was on the making…
Could we survive in this jungle world?

I wanna know what’s in our way...
Reclaiming His Mate is a rejected mate werewolf shifter romance. It can be read as a standalone but believe me, you'll want to devour it with the rest of the books!

rising.title: I'm 100 Million Stronger Than the Ancestor
rising.author: Mella
rising.description:
Olivia, who had been in a deep slumber for a thousand years, was awakened and embarked on a journey to uncover her true identity.
Skilled in witchcraft, array formation, and magic, she was a master of all.
The vampire ancestors were so frightened that they fled away, exclaiming, “This terrifying woman is still alive! We can’t provoke her!”
The monster hunters pleaded to Olivia, “Please take in this thousand-year-old monster!”
The priests also begged Olivia, “We are all your descendants. You must revive our career!”
Olivia gave a cold smile. But how did she become a vampire?

rising.title: Single Mom Claimed by The Alpha
rising.author: Sophia
rising.description:
My fiancé vanished on our wedding day. Later, I fell for Marcus, a down-and-out alpha, but left after seeing him with Isabella.

Heartbroken, I left with our child. A plane crash made Marcus believe our daughter and I were dead.

Five years later, we meet at a school.

"You're alive?" Marcus stared in shock.

"Sorry to disappoint," I replied coldly.

"I've searched for you both for four years!"

"Don't you have Isabella now?" I laughed bitterly.

"I never forgot you..."

"We're over, Marcus."

Can we fated mates hold onto each other this time?

rising.title: Mr. CEO, the Girl from Five Years Ago is Back
rising.author: Eve
rising.description:
Damian vs Grace: aloof, handsome heir vs brave, soft‑looking girl who makes the first move.
They fall; a bad misunderstanding sends her overseas. He chases, crashes, forgets... Five years later, at a crowded crosswalk, their eyes lock—
"My heartbeat recognized you before I did."

rising.title: Blood of the Obsidian Queen
rising.author: Dehni Salem
rising.description:
Anya Volkov is the daughter of one of the most ruthless Mafia heads ever to exist, and she's set to pick up the crown when her father dies. His one wish? That she marry his partner's son, Julien, and become the Queen of the South.

Julien, with his beauty and strength, owns the hearts of nearly every woman in Louisiana. Yet, how can she tell her father that her heart already belongs to another? Someone darker and possessive. Someone she's not supposed to care about at all. Someone forbidden.

She's set to marry Julien next spring, and all she can think about is her one passionate night with Luca. It started with gunshots and ended with long kisses and powerful arms protecting her from assassins.

Now she has to decide between her father's legacy and her heart's desire.

Walk this dark tale with Anya as she works her way through the passion-filled nights of Louisiana and finds her way to the future that awaits her. Watch as she fights through Assassins, Vampires, and Mafia Dens filled with murderers and betrayal to finally become... the Obsidian Queen.

rising.title: Pregnant with the Mafia's Twins
rising.author: oyindamola aduke
rising.description:
Five years ago, she ran for her life. Now he wants his family back… at any cost.

Once trapped in a loveless marriage to Dario Moretti, Italy’s most feared mafia king. Elena Caruso barely escaped with her unborn twins and her life. Framed for betrayal by Dario’s cunning stepmother and humiliated by his affairs, Elena was cast aside like trash. When he tried to kill her and their child, she vanished into the shadows of New York, starting over with a new name and an iron heart.

Now a sought-after interior designer, Elena is confident, fearless, and thriving, until Dario crashes back into her world like a loaded gun, desperate to reclaim what he threw away.

But Elena isn't the same fragile woman he once controlled. And she won’t give up her freedom or her children without a fight.

He wants redemption and she wants revenge, while their twins? They want the truth…

In a world of blood ties and broken vows, love isn’t a fairytale, it’s a battlefield.

rising.title: Trampled Heart
rising.author: Olivia
rising.description:
On my wedding day, a group of criminals broke into our home! They kidnapped my husband and me, and I was raped!
Feigning submission, I waited for the right moment and fought back, killing them!
I thought the nightmare was finally over. However, years later, a stranger approached me.
To my shock, I discovered he was one of the criminals who had invaded my home all those years ago!
He hadn’t died! He was back to seek his revenge...

rising.title: Whispers of Briar Ridge
rising.author: estherade242
rising.description:
It started with a scream and the smell of smoke.

A house on fire. A teenage boy arrested. Another body found hours later with a knife in his chest. In a Southern town that hadn't seen a conviction in over twenty years, two crimes in one night was practically an apocalypse.

That same night, Elijah Ward—once a top-tier defense attorney in New York—drove past the town's faded welcome sign, returning to a place he swore he'd never step foot in again.

He wasn't back for justice. He wasn't back to help. He was back for his daughter… and a secret he buried ten years ago.

But when he’s pulled into defending two boys from opposite sides of town—one rich, one poor—both claiming innocence in cases that seem open and shut, he realizes the truth isn’t just buried… it’s protected.
